transcription.text: In the 80s, Honda became known for its reliable, feature-filled cars. You ready, Dad? I love this car. But today, the 90s begin with the new Geo Prism. The quality sedan with 16-valve performance, Prism is designed for years of carefree driving. With more of the features and little extras that make life easier, so you know you'll be friends for a long time. Get to know the new Geo Prism at your Chevrolet Geo dealers.
